title: Chiikawa: Nanka Chiisakute Kawaii Yatsu
titleRomaji: Chiikawa: Nanka Chiisakute Kawaii Yatsu
titleNative: ちいかわ なんか小さくてかわいいやつ
synonyms: 吉伊卡哇 這又小又可愛的傢伙
synopsis: The sometimes happy, sometimes sad, and a tad stressful daily life of "some sort of small, cute creature" known as Chiikawa. Chiikawa enjoys delicious food with bees and rabbits, toils hard every day for the rewards of work, and still maintains a smile. (Source: Anime News Network) Note: The manga started being published by Nagano in their own Twitter since January, 2020. The manga got licensed by the publishing editorial Kodansha on February, 2021.

synopsis: If you become a hero and defeat the Demon King, a life of idleness awaits you...! This is what the young man Jirei believed, and he worked hard day and night to achieve his goal. However, when he found out that the heroes who defeated the Demon King were the ones who were doing all the hard work, he ran away. But the girls that Jirei had been saving on his journeys before he knew it came pouring in one after another to win his heart and body...?

synopsis: In the year 1947, the people of Shinjuku are down on their luck. With little money to buy food or necessities, some resort to gambling in order to survive. Traveling Tetsuya chooses to spend his time at Mahjong parlors where he is wiping the floor clean with his adversaries. However, Tetsuya meets the intensely-skilled Boushu-san, this is when he realizes that his skills are still lacking. (Source: Anime News Network)

synopsis: Who wouldn’t have a thing for Himegasaki Sakurako? With her blonde pigtails, cute demeanor, and buxom body, she draws all of the eyes at school. If only her crush, Mimori Natsuki, saw her as more than his childhood gal pal! Can this loveable loser stop getting into embarrassing situations and finally land the boy of her dreams? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Jipchang Malgo, Ihonhae Juseyo!
titleRomaji: Jipchang Malgo, Ihonhae Juseyo!
titleNative: 집착 말고, 이혼해 주세요!
synonyms: I Want a Divorce, Please Stop Obsessing Over Me!
Don’t Be Obsessed, Let’s Get a Divorce!
synopsis: Edelis Brill, the beloved only daughter of a countess, sees herself stabbed to death by the emperor's sword in a book she discovers in her study. Seeking to change her fate, Edelis rescues the book's sole main character, the slave gladiator Lehan, and pours her endless affection into him. But! Lehan, whom she believed would protect her from the emperor's blade, has returned as the emperor, intent on her heart?! Edelis tries to escape, but Lehan's obsession grows ever stronger... Stop obsessing, divorce me! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

titleRomaji: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
titleNative: 田中家、転生する。
synopsis: An ordinary family that loves cats. One day, the whole Tanaka family died during a major earthquake. When they woke up, they were reincarnated as the Stuart family, a noble family from another world. Though everyone is dressed in the Western style, they have memories of their previous Japanese lives. Even though they’re confused, they’ve gotten used to living in another world.

Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)

title: Bing Jiao Meimei Zhi Xiang Rang Wo Qifu Ta
titleRomaji: Bing Jiao Meimei Zhi Xiang Rang Wo Qifu Ta
titleNative: 病娇妹妹只想让我欺负她
synonyms: Mi hermanita solo quiere que la intimide
The Yandere Sister Just Wants Me to Bully Her
synopsis: Gu Xing, a novelist, deeply detests manipulative women who play coy, so she intentionally created such a main character for her webnovel, so she can abuse the fictional character in all sorts of ways! However, she never imagined that she would end up transported into her own story, and now she gets to take it out on her personally! But due to her own fetish for pretty girls, she couldn't bring herself to harm the beautiful protagonist she created, and she eventually ends up becoming her protector instead… As she was worrying about her own mixed feelings, the supposedly helpless protagonist pushes the male lead away and insistently confesses her love for Gu Xing instead! What! So I was the one being protected all along! (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Lodoss Tousenki: Eiyuu Kishiden
titleRomaji: Lodoss Tousenki: Eiyuu Kishiden
titleNative: ロードス島戦記-英雄騎士伝-
synonyms: Record of Lodoss War: Chronicles of the Heroic Knight
synopsis: Five years ago, a band of six adventurers defeated the conquering armies of Marmo, the dark island, and saved the accursed island, Lodoss. Since that day, the survivors have been honored as heroes, and their deeds have become legends. But the evil never perished...it retreated, waited and schemed. Now, the Black Knight of Marmo has returned to threaten the accursed island once more. Old heroes must heed the call to defend their homeland and new heroes are forged as the battle for Lodoss begins anew... (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

chapterSourceTitle: Echo of the Cross

title: The Tale of a Little Alchemist Blessed by the Spirits
titleRomaji: Outo no Hazure no Renkinjutsushi: Hazure Shokukyou Datta node, Nonbiri Omise Keiei Shimasu
titleEnglish: The Tale of a Little Alchemist Blessed by the Spirits
titleNative: 王都の外れの錬金術師 ~ハズレ職業だったので、のんびりお店経営します~
synopsis: Daisy’s new life is already a world apart from the last. Once cast out for a “worthless” job and left to die alone, she’s now the cherished daughter of a viscount—with a rare skill, a loving family, and a future that’s finally hers to shape. Sure, she’s been saddled with the “undesirable” job of Alchemist again, but things couldn’t be more different this time. With her Appraisal ability, the blessing of the spirits, and brand-new alchemy tools at her side, Daisy is ready to turn her second chance into something truly magical. Before long, she’s brewing potions for kingdoms, gathering rare materials with ease, and still finding time to bake fresh bread. This time, the overpowered alchemist is going to make sure her future shines bright! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 4 I want to save the Royal Academy's library!
titleEnglish: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 4 I want to save the Royal Academy's library!
titleRomaji: Honzuki no Gekokujou: Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen Dai 4-bu - Kizoku-in no Toshokan wo Sukuitai!
titleNative: 本好きの下剋上~司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません~ 第四部 「貴族院の図書館を救いたい！」
synopsis: Manga adaptation of Part 4 of Honzuki no Gekokujou . Rozemyne has awoken from her two-year slumber. Everything and everyone has changed, which is as terrifying as it sounds, but she doesn’t have time to waste before she’s thrust toward the Royal Academy—a requirement for becoming a noble. There, she will meet all sorts of colorful teachers and students from other duchies... but can she keep her composure in the face of the most books she’s seen yet? Our bookworm goes to school in the newest installment of this biblio-fantasy by book lovers, for book lovers. (Source: J-Novel Club)
searchTerms: Ascendance of a Bookworm ~I'll do anything to become a librarian!~ Part 4 I want to save the Royal Academy's library!
Honzuki no Gekokujou: Shisho ni Naru Tame ni wa Shudan wo Erandeiraremasen Dai 4-bu - Kizoku-in no Toshokan wo Sukuitai!
本好きの下剋上~司書になるためには手段を選んでいられません~ 第四部 「貴族院の図書館を救いたい！」

Black Moonlight Heroine Always Wants to Mark Me
The Protagonist Of The Black Moon Always Wants To Mark Me
synopsis: A manipulative and calculating Alpha (Disguised as an Omega) × A cold-on-the-outside fearful Omega (Disguised as an Alpha)! When designer Gu Yu transmigrates into an ABO romance, she becomes the villain who will be killed by the protagonist, Su Yue. In order to survive, she decides to flatter the 'fragile Omega', creating stunning looks and helping her dominate showbiz. But Su Yue is not an Omega… she is an Alpha in disguise! And now, with intoxicating wine pheromones, she demands: 'Ready to be marked and be mine?'" (Source: Bilibili, translated)
